zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Baudouin de Guînes II於1135年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯時，他的父親Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand33歲，母親Mathilde de Saint-Omer30歲。他和Chrestienne d'Ardres至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1205年1月2日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯安德烈斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Baudouin de Guînes II于1135年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯时，他的父亲Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand33岁，母亲Mathilde de Saint-Omer30岁。他和Chrestienne d'Ardres至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1205年1月2日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯安德烈斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guînes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Baudouin de Guînes II was born in 1135, in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, was 33 and his mother, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, was 30. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Chrestienne d'Ardres. He died on 2 January 1205, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Baudouin de Guînes II est né en 1135, à Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Chrestienne d'Ardres. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1205, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Baudouin de Guînes II 1135 in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand 33 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Saint-Omer 30. Er hatte mit Chrestienne d'Ardres mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Januar 1205 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Baudouin de Guînes II è nato il nel 1135 nel Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Chrestienne d'Ardres. Morì il 2 gennaio 1205, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Baudouin de Guînes IIが1135年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gandは33歳，母Mathilde de Saint-Omerは30歳であった。彼はChrestienne d'Ardresとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1205年1月2日に故郷で70歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアンドレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Baudouin de Guînes II(이)가 1135년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Saint-Omer(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Chrestienne d'Ardres(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 1월 2일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 앤드레스에 묻혔다.

mn.Nevendon, Essex, England: Nevendon, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Baudouin de Guînes II nasceu em 1135, em Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Chrestienne d'Ardres. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1205, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Baudouin de Guînes II родился в 1135 г. в местности гуiнесь, калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Saint-Omer, 30. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Chrestienne d'Ardres. Он умер 2 января 1205 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности андресь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Baudouin de Guînes II nació en 1135, en Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Chrestienne d'Ardres. Murió el 2 de enero de 1205, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Andres, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
